title: At the Pharmacy — Body and Health
description: Body parts, common symptoms, and how to say 'my head hurts' without panic. Plus advice phrases.
summary_pt_br: Partes do corpo + sintomas + no caixa da farmácia. Armadilha: em inglês você 'TEM dor de cabeça' (I HAVE a headache), não 'sou com dor'. Expressão comum: 'My X hurts'.

scenes.text_en:
Dona Lúcia walked into the pharmacy.
'MY HEAD HURTS,' she said. 'I HAVE A HEADACHE and a SORE THROAT.
I also FEEL TIRED and a little DIZZY.'
The pharmacist smiled. 'Rest, tea, and this small pill.'
scenes.text_pt:
Dona Lúcia entrou na farmácia.
'MINHA CABEÇA DÓI,' disse. 'Tô COM DOR DE CABEÇA e GARGANTA INFLAMADA.
Também me SINTO CANSADA e um pouco TONTA.'
O farmacêutico sorriu. 'Descanso, chá e este comprimido.'

scenes.title: English says HAVE, not BE
scenes.body_en: For symptoms, English uses HAVE + A + symptom. 'I HAVE a headache.' NOT 'I am with pain in the head.' Or say 'My X HURTS' — 'My tooth HURTS', 'My eyes HURT'. Plural noun → HURT (no -S).
scenes.body_pt: Sintomas em inglês usam HAVE. 'I have a headache' (não 'I am with headache'). Ou 'My tooth hurts' (meu dente dói). Plural: 'My eyes hurt'.

exercise.question: Which is correct?
exercise.explanation: HAVE + A + symptom. The English formula.

exercise.question: Complete: 'My eyes ___.' (hurt — plural)
exercise.explanation: Plural subject, no -S on the verb.

exercise.question: Complete: "I have a bad ___ and a sore throat."
exercise.explanation: The full phrase is: "I have a bad headache and a sore throat."

exercise.question: Pick the best response. ('Há três dias.')
exercise.explanation: The correct response is: "For three days."

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Hello. What seems to be the problem?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I have a bad headache and a sore throat.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How long have you felt this way?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, I have a small fever.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: I will give you medicine for three days.
turns.pt: Vou receitar remédio por três dias.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Thank you, doctor. When should I return?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Come back if you do not feel better.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "At the Pharmacy — Body and Health". Body parts, common symptoms, and how to say 'my head hurts' without panic. Plus advice phrases. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up. The ocean in Praia do Sol keeps moving, and so does your English.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: A chave é a prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever seus próprios exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "At the Pharmacy — Body and Health". I liked it because it was clear and short. Tomorrow we will practice again. See you then!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule about the past
At the Pharmacy — Body and Health
check.explanation: She says: "Today in class we studied 'At the Pharmacy — Body and Health'".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala claramente o título: "At the Pharmacy — Body and Health".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para você estudar mais. Salve os links e volte sempre.
